name: Cinnamon Apple Dip
directions: Mix the three ingredients together and chill.
Serve with slices of raw apple and dip like potato chips.

name: Caramel Cream Cheese Apple Dip
directions: Pour the ice cream topping over the block of cream cheese and serve with sliced apples.

name: Apples and Peanut Butter Dip
directions: Put peanut butter in a medium bowl.
Add about a quarter of the Cool Whip and stir until creamy.
Add some more Cool Whip, stirring/ folding to further thin the peanut butter.
Continue to add Cool Whip in batches until the dip is completely mixed.
The trick is to mix completely but not mash any more of the air out of the Cool Whip than is necessary.
It will taste great, regardless; but the texture is nicer, the lighter it is.
The kids won't care, but adults might notice.
Serve the peanut butter mixture with apple slices and dip away.

name: Creamy Peanut Butter Fruit Dip
directions: Beat the cream cheese and sugar until fluffy. Add the peanut butter.
Once it's well mixed, fold in the Cool Whip.
Store it in the refrigerator.

name: Apple Dip
directions: Mix all of the ingredients together until creamy.
Eat with sliced apples!

name: Fruit Dip
directions: Mix cool whip and sour cream, sprinkle in the jello and stir well.
Chill and serve with fresh fruit cut for dipping.
Note:  adjust the amount of jello to your taste.  ie:  1/2 pkg. for mild flavor.

name: Marshmallow Fruit Dip
directions: With mixer blend all above ingredients until smooth and creamy.
Serve with your favorite sliced fruits or pound cake.
Enjoy.

name: Fabulous Fruit Dip
directions: Whip cream cheese with electric mixer.
Add cool whip and marshmallow fluff. Mix well.
Refrigerate 1-2 hours.
Serve with a variety of fruits, vegetables, and/or nuts.

name: Creamy Fruit Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients together well.
Chill for at least one hour to blend flavors.
Serve with your favorite fruit.

name: Autumn Apple Dip
directions: Combine all ingredients together.
Spread on sliced apples.

name: Healthy Peanut Butter Dip
directions: Whisk all the ingredients together in a large bowl.
Serve chilled with fruit, pretzels, cookies, or whatever sounds good to you.

similar.name: Easy Peanut Butter Dip for Fruit

name: My Favorite Apple Dip
directions: Mix the sugars, vanilla, & cream cheese together (it will be thick & hard to stir).
After the mixture is well blended add the toffee bits. (I like to crush about half the toffee bits before adding them).
Use as a dip to your favorite apples.

name: Easy Peanut Butter Dip for Fruit
directions: Spoon peanut butter into micorwave safe bowl top with honey.  Microwave for about 30-45 seconds and mix to distribute honey evenly.
Dip fruit in while hot and enjoy!
